action_set_definitions.name: get_learner_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the World Model for the current internal state of the learner, including knowledge mastery levels, engagement, fatigue, and completed modules.

action_set_definitions.name: run_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers a specific assessment module. Returns the performance results and identifies specific clinical failure modes if applicable.

assessment_id.description: The unique identifier for the assessment to be conducted (e.g., 'Malignant_Hyperthermia_Diagnostic').

action_set_definitions.name: assign_content_module
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns and executes a specific instructional or remediation module to the learner.

module_id.description: The unique identifier of the content module.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_learner_wellbeing
action_set_definitions.description: Executes an intervention to adjust the learner's fatigue or engagement levels. Note: Interventions may have trade-offs (e.g., rest may slightly lower engagement).

intervention_type.description: The type of intervention to apply: 'rest' to decrease fatigue, 'motivation_boost' to increase engagement.

state_description.knowledge_mastery: A map of topic IDs to mastery levels (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.engagement_score: A value from 0.0 to 1.0 representing the learner's current focus and motivation.
state_description.completed_modules: A list of unique identifiers for content already finished by the learner.
state_description.fatigue_level: A value from 0.0 to 1.0; high fatigue reduces performance on assessments.
